query:
INSERT INTO performers (name, performerType, imageUrl, bio) VALUES
('Adriana Chechik', 'Legend', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/MhwAfTMnvFJMbLjg.png', 'Athletic powerhouse known for intense performances and fearless approach. Industry legend with multiple specialties.'),
('Mia Malkova', 'Legend', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/vpqXORyANZunktIl.png', 'Stunning blonde performer with girl-next-door charm and captivating blue eyes. Top-tier industry talent.'),
('Kendra Lust', 'MILF', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/fQYqHtUFKBWzMUzf.png', 'Sophisticated mature performer and industry legend known for elegance and experience.'),
('Alexis Texas', 'Legend', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/TgnaPEUNoyqhvOOX.png', 'Iconic blonde performer with signature style and legendary status in the industry.')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
imageUrl = VALUES(imageUrl),
performerType = VALUES(performerType),
bio = VALUES(bio);
